TimeEntry.Title: Synchronization Issue MattW,Matyas,RyansWin11,ChadMorris (ManageEngine)
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked the ManageEngine portal and found synchronization issues with MattW,Matyas,RyansWin11,ChadMorris.Logged in and resolved the issue. All machines are now syncing properly with ManageEngine.

TimeEntry.Title: MattW,KevinT,ChadMorris : Update cisco secure client with latest version
TimeEntry.Notes:
MattW, KevinT, ChadMorris:
I accessed all the listed machines, downloaded and installed the latest version of Cisco Secure Client (cisco-secure-client-win-5.1.14.145), and confirmed that the updates were applied successfully. I also verified in the Cisco portal that all systems are syncing properly.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Ryan with SAS needs assistance with setting up and email for an employee
TimeEntry.Notes:
Ryan with SAS called in to set-up the new user email...

so login to the office 365 portal and checked the licenses....

license is not available...so requested shaundra to buy the license...

Create the user and assign the license to user....

Login details has been shared with Ryan...hence closing the ticket.....

TimeEntry.Title: Manage-Engine Latest version updated 11.5.2600.19.W - KEVIN-MAAHS,MATTW,MATYAS,RYANSWIN11
TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the My RMM portal, and found the machine KEVIN-MAAHS,MATTW,MATYAS,RYANSWIN11 running with old version of 
Manage-Engine. So connected to the machine  and then uninstalled the OLD version and downloaded and installed the latest
version (11.5.2600.19.W) of the manage-engine agent. Verified from the portal, device is running with updated agent version.

TimeEntry.Title: ChadMorris,Matyas,Kevin-Maahs,MattW, RyansWin11 Missing Patches Deployed
TimeEntry.Notes:
Worked on the Missing patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the approved patches for the machines ChadMorris,Matyas,Kevin-Maahs,MattW, RyansWin11.I downloaded and manually installed the applicable failed/missing patches. Rebooted the computers, Scanned the machines All previously missing patches were successfully updated.

Patches are High Definition Audio[HDAUDIO\FUNC_01&VEN_1002&DEV_AA01] (10.0.1.42)
Google Chrome (x64) (145.0.7632.68)
Zoom Workplace (EXE) (x64) (User Based) (6.7.5.30439)
Update for Microsoft 365 Apps for Business Current Channel for x64 2601 of version(19628.20204)
Windows Malicious Software Removal Tool x64 - Feb 2026 (KB890830)

Realtek High Definition Audio[HDAUDIO\FUNC_01&VEN_10EC&DEV_0671] (6.0.9865.1)

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.33.20505.0)updated on machines CHADMORRIS,KEVIN-MAAHS,MATYAS,RYANSWIN11
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines CHADMORRIS,KEVIN-MAAHS,MATYAS,RYANSWIN11
running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines and uninstalled the old version  and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version 7.33.20505.0
of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version V0.14.132 on RYANSWIN11,MATYAS,KEVINT,KEVIN-MAAHS
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following machines on  is old version V0.14.96. Connected to the machines RYANSWIN11,MATYAS,KEVINT,KEVIN-MAAHS from manage engine, download and installed the latest version Ver0.14.132. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Device Non-Compliant Due to Missing Patches ChadMorris,Kevin-Maahs,RyansWin11
TimeEntry.Notes:
Devices were showing non-compliant status due to missing patches in the ManageEngine console for the systems ChadMorris, Kevin-Maahs & RyansWin11.

Logged into the ManageEngine portal and reviewed the missing updates. Downloaded and manually deployed the required patches, including:

  • Cisco Secure Client Diagnostics and Reporting Tool (5.1.13.177) – Manual upload and installation completed.

  • Google Chrome Enterprise (x64) – googlechromestandaloneenterprise64_145.0.7632.110.msi

  • Microsoft Defender Security Intelligence Update – mpam-fe-defender-x64.exe

  • Intel Graphics Driver Package – PCI__VEN_8086_DEV_4692.cab

Completed the installation on all affected systems and verified the updated versions.

Performed a post-installation scan, and the devices are now showing compliant status with no pending missing patches in the ManageEngine console.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Adding a new employee - Ghassen Salamah
TimeEntry.Notes: As per the request, the email ID has been created, the Business Standard license has been assigned to the user, and the user account has been updated accordingly

TimeEntry.Title: My Remote version 25.9.9.9533 updated on machine CHADMORRIS,KEVINT,MATTW,MATYAS
TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine CHADMORRIS,KEVINT,MATTW,MATYAS
running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine  .
Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 25.9.9.9533. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest
